textByHash.4655125ad2aa4fa7307575ad028d235a3e6ca892: You assume correctly, but where do you get such impertinence.
textByHash.7fa3a8538fb577caa104adf322d5a16b6abfd892: A hoax? I've never heard such a ridiculous thing...
textByHash.9e0f140b8f5dcd5f247fa12bd8a5338c77aec609: Ah... I see. Well then you are right about the plague. But I did it for the good of my people.
textByHash.a990a4671d5f5b4e0fa8f0a4213bd69687320296: When it protects them from a far greater danger, a fear too big to fathom.
textByHash.f0ee3e2304e6fe8e7d8be9b773085616e44ead3c: When my father was king, he ruled over a united Ardougne. But on his deathbed, he could not decide which of his sons should succeed him, so he had the city split into two.
textByHash.b3e08729d136227c5b07c0a3a4cd8ea18cb6d72f: I became king of East Ardougne while my brother, Tyras, ruled over West Ardougne. My brother was a good man and was great at many things. Being a king was not one of them.
textByHash.c00fce284a01f4aa4ebcffe9141621a0589cc9f4: Rather than looking after his people, he went on numerous expeditions to the lands west of here. On one of these expeditions, he was captured by the forces of the Dark Lord.
textByHash.5fbe0679cb82c1a56cdd44f54f027702b8131007: The Dark Lord agreed to spare his life, but only on one condition... That he would drink from the Chalice of Eternity.
textByHash.c847a57b1a32a4b7e97103552016560be35d8468: The chalice corrupted him. He joined forces with the Dark Lord, the embodiment of pure evil...
textByHash.1a39a4d91ad895a6d065c6195afbd250be57b978: And so I erected the wall, not just to protect my people, but to protect all the people of Gielinor. Tyras is king of West Ardougne, sealing off the city was the only way to stop him and the Dark Lord.
textByHash.dfc97dede700695b513ffa8111f92b452aa80cb2: I knew people would never believe the truth, so I had the plague made up as an excuse for the cordon. I'm not proud of it, but it was the only way to keep people safe.
textByHash.c65d8e51c29996f0683ed6020355100c754e6aa6: While my brother is still at large, I must ask that you keep this secret. We can't bring the wall down until we know he is no longer a danger.
textByHash.89470ab4edfe0736472831cc3efef3424d6dea60: You're willing to help? Gods be praised!
textByHash.e14cf831b8d7845f8cda3fdafb74f466354aef51: My brother is currently gathering strength in the lands to the west. If we are to stop him, we must find a way through the mountains. There is an underground pass that should lead through but it is full of danger.
textByHash.740ee2130a1faf84d9f44e0f73eb80030d323c91: Return to me when you are ready to face this peril. Until then, I give you permission to use my training area. It's located just to the north west of the city.
textByHash.69fa6643f06e8c8219190f8b4896dfaab78ea43b: I'll also let the mourners know that you are a friend to Ardougne. You will be allowed to pass through the gates to West Ardougne whenever you please. Now, you'd better be off. You have much to prepare for.
textByHash.305ea60285d2c13b5dd13dd37aab53d51e2464e7: Do you need anything else adventurer?
textByHash.4678b0ab6e88fce33ba413a82db13b8c2a810236: Your enthusiasm is to be commended. Very well, if you feel you are already prepared then who am I to stop you.
textByHash.d397ec0f7ab97924df44aed1935999610be6b42b: As we've previously discussed, my brother is currently gathering strength in the lands west of here. The only known way into those lands is through the Underground Pass.
textByHash.b119c431220c9ef0a558fcf612a1bd551280c18a: Very well. Return to me once you are ready and we will discuss our next steps.
textByHash.4bca1a4fd22ac47682f17600e5e27d41efef1dea: And to you adventurer. I assume you're here about King Tyras?
textByHash.2f7fa11c1aa172bb2c826be72b684ac90d5c6046: Well, as we've previously discussed, my brother is currently gathering strength in the lands west of here. The only known way into those lands is through the Underground Pass.
textByHash.3c7b6457e6f592c339f775b644be5e87f56acf2f: Fair enough. Return to me when you are ready and we will discuss our next steps.
textByHash.54691f33aa6f6bf3397b5765e626fec8a1744265: We've had various reports come in about a sudden increase in dragon activity. I assume this is what you're referring to?
textByHash.e6af4db6e78e258f03dd289d71f538bb64688ef6: I see. I will ensure our forces are ready to fight back against this threat.
textByHash.7929f406201afa791c2eaaedd5f9d43948597f13: An alliance with King Roald? Interesting. We have no quarrel with Misthalin. I accept.
textByHash.8d6488092d016099b04526b02b4eed946ae5ec19: The solution is clear. We need to take these dragons head on and destroy them.
textByHash.1cf3001f131fa934c7cc660754dd7db418649474: And what would the great King Arthur have us do? Would you cower in fear while these dragons annihilate those around you?
textByHash.bcad8ec05560049639b93afd6023bf2e3839f1c3: I had no idea that place had any value at all! All this about my Great Grandfather and Jorral's plans to make it into a museum makes for a convincing case.
textByHash.1201e95f0f9047db7406c1ba0e25015962eff677: Very well, I will comply with his request. Take this letter back to him with my kind regards.
textByHash.bafc19829a4f1db61ee903b85f26ce3bf75b482c: Have you taken that letter to Jorral yet?
textByHash.b8281023da50805606326ce2b9ea467454d455ad: Ahh... adventurer. The repair work on the Well of Voyage has been completed. We're finally ready to move against my brother.
textByHash.8361b9d75ec9b90ac2702382969c0fc6c17dd50e: I do indeed. I recently managed to make contact with the elves that inhabit the western lands.
textByHash.0d1fc168c23f61fbe8c6b3b0b23aa4c729b465f0: Well that may well change soon. Apparently, my brother has been causing them quite a bit of trouble. As such, they've agreed to help us get rid of him once and for all.
textByHash.c24c0fc24f68bb8ec284815ff757eb9f08e0bb05: You are to head into the Underground Pass and through the Well of Voyage. Lord Iorwerth, the leader of the elves, will send some representatives to meet you on the other side.
textByHash.bd46b1fbfe4a2c52baa1082c226a6375af360074: With their help, you are to find my brother and kill him. Once that's done, return to me.
textByHash.f6443fc7948447d62819f6989be8556db7124a82: My brother may not be the only threat you face. I hear the elves are currently dealing with a rebellion. The rebels likely won't take kindly to you working with their enemy so be on the look out.
textByHash.ec1892cd0c1dbe2e130b40fa94c2c773418bcd90: As you wish. Return to me when you are ready and we will begin.
textByHash.113c6f98c9031dd72fd0570b0d48fe691f1df47e: My brother, King Tyras, was always a bit of an explorer. He went on numerous expeditions to the lands west of here. On one of these expeditions, he was captured by the forces of the Dark Lord.
textByHash.e20998683b23c0ce2c8c0ddcef4211fc49df5d8a: The Dark Lord agreed to spare his life, but only on one condition... That he would drink from the Chalice of Eternity. The chalice corrupted him. He joined forces with the Dark Lord, the embodiment of pure evil...
textByHash.c9b2c2c03838f419da786367fc20cbfeddff96c5: As a result, I had a wall built around West Ardougne to act as a barrier between him and the rest of the world. Tyras is king of West Ardougne, sealing off the city was the only way to stop him and the Dark Lord.
textByHash.a072fcfe010a92ee4bc21c2d83ff3b4decf1e6e8: Indeed we are. My brother has been gathering strength in the west, preparing to move against us. But now that we have a way through, we can move against him first.
textByHash.8f36e771af1f5033f775feb7ae8c65fa0c5baa27: Farewell adventurer. Return to me once you are ready to begin.
textByHash.4ca81663718fda016cb6461f6b4d5d1368a04c86: This is grand news indeed! You'll forgive me if I'm a little apprehensive about this, but I take it you do have proof?
textByHash.d8628badf799c5590e7926bfa4a667daf044bbc1: I am sure you have done as you say, but on this matter I can afford no doubts. You must find something to confirm your story.
textByHash.de131d0e239eef1ae6b544e2ff7a17be419beb20: Yes... Good... This will do nicely. Well done, you've done an excellent job.
textByHash.ae58a7fc01d6333e7bffae43431e0bbd38622cf0: Not yet I'm afraid. Even with my brother gone, the Dark Lord remains a threat. For now, the plague must remain.
textByHash.7a216ba089708e2960bda21cecb09e0e38784b5f: Anyway, I'll send word when I next require your services. Oh, and I guess you'll be wanting your reward.
textByHash.6dc4b80cb6ac9d3be1d9fd7b1593caa7307e3a69: Hello . What can I do for you?
textByHash.14a8dc74b962693d0c4d7d71cf9a170d81ad6d08: That she has. She was making some heinous accusations.
textByHash.8e1b75cf3e0c2b980e8db477daa6a8056a0f2be0: That's not the point. As I've explained to you before, the plague is a necessary evil. We can't have her exposing the truth and risking everything.
textByHash.f636c33ee497cffad23aeecbe64aa9573a45c411: My brother may be dead but the Dark Lord is still a threat. Until that threat is gone, the plague must remain.
textByHash.625983aa8181a1402ae78a330a25887ae530d245: No. I can't take any risks. Now I'm afraid I have business to attend to. You should be on your way.
textByHash.c84eb7042fd637f747a5b20ef4faaffda420be45: Hello . What can I do for you.
textByHash.a1f7cf4f8df017d1d10a3086023f58082f32c00d: We've been through this already. I will not have the girl freed. She is a threat to Ardougne and will remain imprisoned.
textByHash.449645c8c2d33935ca9d0681c1414b33edf1e105: Hello . I'm afraid I can't talk right now. There's an issue with an escaped prisoner that I need to deal with.
textByHash.a64a00ffc10d01ef338ddd709b71311075550ab8: You call me a traitor? I am your king! The traitors here are the ones standing before me.
textByHash.2ef9fdf4b1baeb0636d1e76bb43f69b9763ea845: And what truth might that be?
textByHash.1d8b274c5ea308f7e2cad14869c7c15f7d7c3252: And I'm sure you'd never do something like that. Don't think I didn't hear about the lies you spread about me.
textByHash.1dc3b8630675f06f5cfdb90c8c730319ea7220a6: You are aware that his killer stands with you, are you not?
textByHash.4d29877ac5a5e94a98ba2aea13e80cc712849a22: Oh don't you go pretending they're innocent! They're nothing more than a mercenary. All they care about is the big pot of gold at the end.
textByHash.6e173774a5dd61fa00c4143c8c2a5ca9f83f661e: They betrayed me! Before long, they'll betray you as well!
textByHash.21c00714529f685294929593413a280e1047430f: My father, King Ulthas, once ruled over a united Kandarin. I was his eldest son, the kingdom was my birthright! But my fool of a father took that from me.
textByHash.4f8a280ff85cc17c8aa8ede166e73b35092cef0f: When King Arthur and his knights arrived in our lands, my father granted them the castle of Camelot, ousting the loyal subjects that previously lived there.
textByHash.a0ab2bb627aeb24d6a58b461664bf30e43366cd0: Not only that, but he also declared that the kingdom be jointly ruled by my brother and I, rather than giving it to me as he should have.
textByHash.99c11c9b9f46ab53537899d786f831e88dda2b79: When I ascended to my half-throne, I promised myself that I would unite this kingdom again, no matter the cost.
textByHash.5716f556714bd78c454bfbd37a8d371db8d15d93: That's why I made the deal with Lord Iorwerth. In return for access to West Ardougne, he agreed to help me kill my brother and drive out King Arthur.
textByHash.7a375b7393422c7b3e969bb284d9f0ae45686a77: In West Ardougne? They were searching for some sort of temple. According to Lord Iorwerth, the power there would be essential in summoning Zamorak, the Dark Lord.
textByHash.4ea6d77b0c1b9c84f6c1a7c5609415f29daf0b57: Of course I did! I prayed to Saradomin that he would help unite my kingdom again. He chose not to reply. I turned to the Dark Lord instead.
textByHash.02b7d3ad4c2fec0eb1dd22080581fdfdb1bb502d: With Zamorak at my side, nothing would stand between me and Camelot!
textByHash.961b9e6f95bf01a9618c326240c4c12c77842ee9: Last I checked it was you that killed him, not me.
textByHash.d471c780123458a833bded902ef64bcb5d12c2ad: My brother was never meant to rule. The kingdom was mine by birthright! My father chose to give him half the kingdom, and he did a terrible job ruling it.
textByHash.dfb347c646cab4a1ca0a1d176b054cefb72570ec: Have you seen West Ardougne? The city is a mess, and not because of the plague. That was my brother's doing. I may be a bad person, but make no mistake, my brother was no hero either.
textByHash.27a3ed936783ec5bb43f9045ccdfab54ecd9468f: Unfortunately, the pass is a treacherous place. Some of my best soldiers have fallen trying to find a way though.
textByHash.aaad74fa197c954fa65a5297a3494157b7fa957c: To make matters worse, some crazed group of cultists has recently made their home in the pass. Their leader, some madman named Iban, claims to be the son of Zamorak himself.
textByHash.6f335c2bba688fa6538108922ba108e3c8a08a40: If my brother is to be stopped, a way through the Underground Pass must be found. This is the task I have for you. Do you think you're up for it?
textByHash.b2f62d9fb38702b6a8b6265bc34509e5c86de1a2: You'll find the entrance to the Underground Pass at the far end of West Ardougne. My main tracker, Koftik, will meet you there.
textByHash.35c558f9bb411488efd30846bb09b1e65bb937f4: Together, you are to find a way through the pass. Once you have done so, return to me.
textByHash.312a7f0505e668a700935b545d8152028907e671: Remember, the Underground Pass is lethal. Go prepared with food and armour or you won't last long.
textByHash.5e3fa0b58254ac8fd4e1c25a75cf7677be83f3c8: Very well. Return to me when you are ready.
textByHash.dd7a7f16bd3bdd51edfd689f4eed4cee3623da53: And to you adventurer. Have you found a way through the Underground Pass yet?
textByHash.0fd5fc33c83174b9156b8507ea4afaf9f4d9f4e5: Well keep at it. Come to me when you have something to report.
textByHash.4eee1fef8b3334c49bf5bc22caeba37de44aa89c: Incredible, you are a true warrior. So do we now have a way through to the west?
textByHash.540d6f7770662da353e04bba2db8a46a82be9db4: I see. I will send our best mages in at once. Once they have made the repairs, we will finally be ready to stop King Tyras.
textByHash.fb4e09c21522b762313b8667ecb36e18f2a73c32: For now, I thank you for your help adventurer. Your loyalty is an inspiration to all.
textByHash.070bc880bf1ea809de99287b16c6c8dc6ebb73e3: It shouldn't take the mages long at all. Once their work is done we will finally be ready to move against my brother.
textByHash.d5892d0f2e3b5512f35adbadebf998b6b1a421bb: You are to head into the Underground Pass and through the Well of Voyage. The mages should have it repaired by the time you arrive.
textByHash.422a5a91f12281d5dd3e31b63cda3d7967db148d: Once you are through, you will be met by some representatives of Lord Iorwerth.
textByHash.766f7acc375fcec73460bcf1afa802cbcf0f2765: Leave me citizen. I'm far too busy to talk.
textByHash.a08cabef951e10b9a32ea588ebd71061d5e21577: Hello . I've got nothing for you right now.
textByHash.555ad01faf90bc1705314add9e53ad660208f767: What are you doing here? All Mourners should know that if they need to contact me, they need to use the proper channels!
textByHash.25505c1a7968c9eb007839efddfac1f97b8d10b7: Well do not let it happen again.
